---
title: ""
output: github_document
---

## Dallas county 

```{r}
library(ManifoldDestiny)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
```

```{r, echo=F}
knitr::knit_exit()
```

```{r }
#View(ManifoldDestiny::dallas_sel)
dfc <- dallas_sel %>% tidyr::drop_na()
#dfc <- dplyr::select(ManifoldDestiny::dallas_sel) %>% tidyr::drop_na()
veclist <- allvectors(dfc)
vecone <- veclist[[1]]
natural <- aggordered(vecone,polynr=6)
```

```{r echo=FALSE}
plotall <- quintileplot2(quintile_df=natural)
```

```{r echo=FALSE}
plotall[[1]]
```

```{r echo=FALSE}
plotall[[2]]
```

```{r echo=FALSE}
plotall[[3]]
```

```{r echo=FALSE}
plotall[[4]]
```
